mapper.sql: id, parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, dept_type, status, visible, sort, leader_id, leader_name, leader_phone, leader_email, phone, email, address, description, is_system, is_deletable, is_editable, dept_icon, dept_color, ext_data, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, remark
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.parent_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.dept_type, d.status, d.visible, d.sort, d.leader_id, d.leader_name, d.leader_phone, d.leader_email, d.phone, d.email, d.address, d.description, d.is_system, d.is_deletable, d.is_editable, d.dept_icon, d.dept_color FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN sys_role_dept rd ON d.id = rd.dept_id WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 AND d.visible = 1 AND rd.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY d.sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT d.id, d.parent_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.dept_type, d.status, d.visible, d.sort, d.leader_id, d.leader_name, d.leader_phone, d.leader_email, d.phone, d.email, d.address, d.description, d.is_system, d.is_deletable, d.is_editable, d.dept_icon, d.dept_color FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON d.id = ur.dept_id INNER JOIN sys_role_dept rd ON d.id = rd.dept_id WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 AND d.visible = 1 AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.sort ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND visible = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enabledDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as disabledDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN visible = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visibleDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN visible = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hiddenDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN dept_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as companyDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN dept_type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as departmentDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN dept_type = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as groupDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN is_system = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as systemDepts, SUM(CASE WHEN is_system = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as customDepts FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dept SET visible = #{visible}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dept SET sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT id, parent_id FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d.id, d.parent_id FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parent_id = dt.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 ) SELECT id FROM dept_tree WHERE id != #{deptId}

WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT id, parent_id FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d.id, d.parent_id FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.id = dt.parent_id WHERE d.deleted = 0 ) SELECT id FROM dept_tree WHERE id != #{deptId}

SELECT
FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND dept_type = #{deptType} ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
